creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
Update Makefile
	No need for Y2K info anymore
	IF there is a need, the site has changed to http://postgresql.readysetnet.com/

Fix: 

BUILD_DEPENDS= autoconf:${PORTSDIR}/devel/autoconf

-Y2K=           http://www.postgresql.org/y2k.html
-
 INSTALLS_SHLIB=        YES
 LDCONFIG_DIRS= %%PREFIX%%/pgsql/lib--EBjzmef0pqLKYJK3NDKgJr80tL4jsASEO6f3om6b9F8cnEpu
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -urN postgresql7.orig/Makefile postgresql7/Makefile
--- postgresql7.orig/Makefile   Tue Dec 26 03:40:03 2000
+++ postgresql7/Makefile        Tue Dec 26 03:44:49 2000
@@ -24,8 +24,6 @@
